highlights.headline: Toronto Raptors vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Toronto Raptors vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Toronto Raptors vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights) 2026/04/20 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Donovan Mitchell scored 30 points, James Harden added 28 and the Cleveland Cavaliers held on for a 115-105 victory over the Toronto Raptors on Monday night for a 2-0 lead in their Eastern Conference first-round series.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mitchell scores 30, Harden adds 28 as Cavaliers beat Raptors 115-105 for 2-0 series lead

video.headline: Toronto Raptors vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights

events.name: Atlanta Hawks at New York Knicks

highlights.headline: Atlanta Hawks vs. New York Knicks: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Atlanta Hawks vs. New York Knicks: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Atlanta Hawks vs. New York Knicks: Game Highlights) 2026/04/21 ESHEET

headlines.description: — CJ McCollum scored 32 points and the Atlanta Hawks rallied to stun the New York Knicks 107-106 on Monday night, tying their first-round playoff series at one game apiece.
headlines.shortLinkText: CJ McCollum leads a late rally as the Hawks stun the Knicks 107-106 to tie their series at 1-1

video.headline: Atlanta Hawks vs. New York Knicks: Game Highlights

highlights.headline: Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights) 2026/04/21 ESHEET

headlines.description: — A big early deficit in Denver didn't bother the Minnesota Timberwolves, who two years ago staged the biggest Game 7 comeback in NBA history, clawing out of a 20-point hole to beat the Nuggets and advance to the Western Conference finals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Edwards and Randle rally Timberwolves past Nuggets 119-114 to even series at 1 apiece

video.headline: Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights
